en: This requirement is triggered because you indicated your organization maintains a valid Personal Income Tax (IRPEF) Form 770 in the Italy IRPEF Applicability Assessment questionnaire.

The Form 770 is the annual return of the tax withholding agent, summarizing withholdings and related data for a specific tax year. Consolidated Text of Income Tax Laws (TUIR) requires companies to act as tax withholding agents to withhold Personal Income Tax (IRPEF) on payments to individuals and to certify those withholdings through the Form 770. The Form 770 is available through the telematic services of Italian Revenue Agency , accessible in the “Receipts” section.
Please upload your company's latest Personal Income Tax (IRPEF) Form 770. Please be sure to redact any personal identifiable information.
Please enter the issue date of your company's Personal Income Tax (IRPEF) Form 770.
Please enter the expiration date as one year after the issue date.
Please enter the expiration date of your company's Personal Income Tax (IRPEF) Form 770.
